findings.description: Incorrect reading order and duplication of header/footer elements.
findings.evidence: In the HTML, the footer logo and address image from the bottom of the PDF is inserted near the top of the page, above the main document title. Additionally, the header text containing the Governor and Secretary names is duplicated as plain text immediately below this misplaced footer.

findings.description: Footer elements are improperly inserted into the main content flow.
findings.evidence: The footer text and logo image from the PDF are inserted directly above the "WebEx Meeting Information:" heading in the HTML, disrupting the logical reading flow between the agenda's end and the meeting details.
